files.diff:
diff --git a/sim_notes.md b/sim_notes.md
index e073f54..af6c361 100644
--- a/sim_notes.md
+++ b/sim_notes.md
@@ -404,2 +404,7 @@ Day 427 / Week 61 observations:
 - Remaining base is all S2 C. The business is nearly fully run off; revenue is billing-timing dependent and the main controllable factor is avoiding unnecessary fixed/compute spend.
 - Week 61 adjustment: move all plans to model tier 1, cut quotas to A=1k/B=5k/C=5k, move capacity to tier 2, cut ops to $1k/day, and keep dev/ad/promotions off.
+
+Day 434 / Week 62 observations:
+- Cash is $1.62M. Subscribers fell to 584 and usage fell to 758k/week with no overload.
+- Remaining base is all S2 C. At this scale, fixed support and capacity costs matter more than preserving a cohort that is already running off.
+- Week 62 adjustment: keep all plans on model tier 1, reduce quotas to A=500/B=1k/C=1k, move capacity to tier 1, set ops/dev/ad spend to $0, and keep promotions off.
